Wash Mushrooms first
Cut them muhsrooms, halves for small size and quarters for larger sizes
Toss the mushrooms, pepper, and tamari all together until evenly seasoned and coated.  Reserve to parchment lined sheet trays
In a convection oven set to ~400°F high fan, roast for ~5 minutes
Rotate the sheet trays after the 5 minutes, and cook an additional ~5 minutes
Mushrooms should be reduced in size with excess water leached to the sheet tray.
Cool in a blast chiller, then reserve in quart containers with the leeched liquid.
Store in the cooler
